workflow.name: AI Workflow Generator
workflow.description: Generate AI image/video workflow from natural language

trigger.description: Triggered when user sends a workflow request

nodes.title: Intent Parser / 意图解析
nodes.description: Parses user input to extract target_platform, model_family, pipeline_type, and modules
nodes.system_prompt: You are an AI workflow intent parser. Extract from user input: target_platform, model_family, pipeline_type, prompt, and optional modules (LoRA/ControlNet/IPAdapter). Output as JSON.

nodes.title: IR Builder / IR构建器
nodes.description: Builds Internal Representation from parsed intent
nodes.system_prompt_ref: Load SKILL.md + knowledge/ir_schema.yaml as reference. Build complete IR object.

nodes.title: IR Validator / IR验证器
nodes.description: Validates IR against 20 rules from rules.yaml
nodes.code_ref: Load knowledge/validators/rules.yaml and apply all CRITICAL and ADVISORY rules to ir_object

nodes.title: Platform Renderer / 平台渲染器
nodes.description: Renders IR to target platform format (ComfyUI JSON, A1111 params, Diffusers Python, API request, or prompt)
nodes.system_prompt_ref: Load appropriate knowledge/platforms/{platform}.yaml and knowledge/models/{model}.yaml. Render IR to platform-native format.

nodes.title: Output Formatter / 输出格式化
nodes.description: Formats final output with workflow file, dependencies, and usage instructions
nodes.system_prompt: Format the output as: 1) The workflow file in a code block, 2) dependencies.md list, 3) usage notes. Be concise and instructional.
